artifacts.title: Really receipt from 2022-08-08
artifacts.excerpt:
i find really smart people scary

there's a threshold at which, if you understand enough about the world and yourself... you can do anything... you aren't constrained by rules, because (like Neo in the Matrix) you can see that they aren't really there 

you become unpredictable

feeling competent doesn't really feel like anything 

it feels like "huh they're hitting the ball at me fairly slowly" or "why can't these people do basic things right?"
